ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.title: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional — without it, PDF extraction uses pdfplumber only (no LLM vision fallback).

SCHOLARTOOLS_LIBRARY_PATH.title: Library Path
SCHOLARTOOLS_LIBRARY_PATH.description: Path to your library JSON file (e.g. /Users/you/research/library.json)

SCHOLARTOOLS_FILES_DIR.title: Files Directory
SCHOLARTOOLS_FILES_DIR.description: Path to your PDF archive directory (e.g. /Users/you/research/files)
